summary: Diff adds a reusable PDF export mode dropdown control (all vs selected) and integrates it into several non-Budget module pages (Baptisms, Localities, Events, Correspondence, Parishioners/Kartoteka, Parish functions). It also expands/changes the shared PDF generator with new single-record/list PDF helpers. However, the diff does not show the export mode control being added to every other non-Budget module that has PDF export (e.g., Dashboard/Statistics/Notes), and includes unrelated changes plus significant PDF template/branding changes that were not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a consistent UI control in every non-Budget module that supports PDF export (Export all / Export selected), excluding Budżet.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the new control added to some pages (BaptismsRegistry, Miejscowosci, Wydarzenia, Korespondencja, Kartoteka, FunkcjeParafialne) but does not show it being added to other non-Budget pages that (per repo summaries) have PDF export, such as Dashboard, Statystyki, Uwagi.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions PDF export in Dashboard.tsx, Statystyki.tsx, Uwagi.tsx; no corresponding diffs shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Any other non-Budget module that currently has a PDF export button also offers the same two export modes (all vs single).
missing_requirements.reason: Only the listed modules in the diff were updated; the diff does not show the two-mode export being implemented for other modules that apparently already have PDF export (e.g., Dashboard, Statystyki, Uwagi).
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (Dashboard.tsx: PDF export functionality; Statystyki.tsx: comprehensive PDF export; Uwagi.tsx: PDF export)
No modified file entries for frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx, frontend/src/pages/Statystyki.tsx, frontend/src/pages/Uwagi.tsx in the provided diff summary

hallucinated_features.description: Unrelated diagnostics enhancements (URL parameter checks, backend connectivity checks, browser environment checks) not part of PDF export mode selection.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest is specifically about adding PDF export mode selection and single-record export flows; diagnostics improvements are not mentioned.

hallucinated_features.description: Significant PDF template/branding redesign (logo, biblical quote, styling, auto-print flow) beyond what is necessary to support all-vs-selected exports.
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goals/constraints state not to change the visual design of existing PDF templates beyond what is necessary to support single-record vs all-record exports, but pdfGenerator changes describe enhanced professional branding with additional header/quote/styling and auto-print behavior.
evidence: frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts ("Enhanced professional PDF generator with parish logo, biblical quote, and auto-print functionality" and extensive HTML/CSS changes)
